title: Unified latent-preview bus (local + remote), engine-tagged
description: One system ingests latent-preview frames from BOTH engines (local ComfyUI WS + remote Pod WS), normalizes + correctly attributes them, and emits a clean engine-tagged event any component can subscribe to. Fixes two MPI-259 bugs (app pane stops latents after stage-1->stage-2; gallery briefly shows previous gen's latent) as a byproduct. Standalone card for a separate session so it doesn't block MPI-259 Apps work.
